acceptance_basis: Project-owner calibration waiver on 2026-07-15 after Pilot v3 and two fresh five-run confirmation sets. Strict distribution envelopes remain recorded as rejected; no claim is made that either strict candidate passed.
policy_rules: Input-event timestamps must be strictly increasing.
The nominal one-cadence class must be the modal positive-interval class.
The median interval must map to the nominal one-cadence class.
The p99 residual of single-cadence intervals must remain within the half-cadence partition boundary.
Receipt bursts and missing-cadence gaps are retained as diagnostics rather than automatic rejection; gaps split resampling segments and are never interpolated across.
Production records user-configured polling rate as metadata and measures actual cadence for every session.
filter_padlen_basis: The approved fifth-order Butterworth design has three SOS sections and one first-order section. Applying the documented scipy.signal.sosfiltfilt default-padlen structure formula yields 18 samples; P0-R5 must verify this against the generated coefficients.
